Content I create

I make content for brands that feel at home in my world.

⌨️
Keyboards & Tech
Mechanical keyboards, accessories, cute peripherals. My core niche and highest-performing category.
📦
Unboxing & Reviews
Honest first impressions in 30 to 40 seconds. If I wouldn't use it, I won't make a video about it.
🖥️
Desk & Setup
Aesthetic desk accessories, gadgets, anything that makes a setup cuter. Giftable products do well here.
✨
Cute Tech
Cameras, earbuds, displays. If it has a pastel colourway or a cute IP collab, my audience is interested.
💅
Lifestyle Adjacent
Fashion, accessories, collectibles, selectively. Products that fit the soft-girl aesthetic resonate best.
🎨
UGC & Brand Assets
High-quality vertical video assets for brand-side use. Product-first, aesthetic-led, voiceover driven.

What you get

One format.
Done well.

I do one thing with care. Short, voiceover-led vertical video that shows your product in context, not as an ad. Brands can licence content for paid amplification or use it organically.

FormatVertical video (9:16) · TikTok / IG Reel / YouTube Shorts
Length30 to 40 seconds
StyleVoiceover review · First-person honest · Pastel aesthetic b-roll
Best fitKeyboards, cute tech, desk accessories, lifestyle-adjacent
Usage rightsDiscuss on enquiry · Ads amplification available
